text.title: Experiment Ledger Discipline Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree routes on entry state + intent to the next mutation. Each leaf cites a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Intent: open new / update existing / close / supersede?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — do not create; populate fields first
create entry with status=proposed; tag from frozen taxonomy
STOP — create new entry with prev_entry_id + delta_reason; never mutate in place
create new entry; set old.superseded_by = new.entry_id

example.trace: result invalidates a prior closed entry

text.example: intent=supersede → superseded-by-chain → create new entry; set old.superseded_by.
